title: Unauthorized transactions after account takeover
body: Someone gained access to my account and made $4,200 in unauthorized transfers. The app has no 2FA requirement and customer support took 3 weeks to respond. Filed an FDIC complaint and contacted my state AG.

title: Hidden overdraft fees not disclosed
body: Was charged $35 overdraft fees 6 times in one day for transactions under $5. The fee schedule was buried in a 40-page terms document. This is predatory and violates CFPB transparency guidelines.

title: Robo-advisor executed trades without authorization
body: The robo-advisor sold all my bond positions and bought crypto without my approval or any notification. Lost $8,000 in one day. The terms say advisory only but they're making discretionary trades.

title: APR advertised 5%, actual 24%
body: Applied for a personal loan advertised at 5.99% APR. Got approved at 23.99% with no explanation. The advertised rate requires a credit score over 800 but this is buried in footnote text. Classic bait-and-switch.

title: Account frozen without explanation for 3 weeks
body: My account with $12,000 was frozen for 21 days with zero explanation. No fraud, no suspicious activity. Customer service said 'compliance review' but couldn't provide details. I couldn't pay rent.

title: Data breach — SSN exposed on dark web
body: Received notification that my SSN, DOB, and account numbers were exposed in a data breach. The company waited 6 months to notify customers. My identity has already been used for fraudulent credit applications.

title: Debt collector called 40+ times in one week
body: A debt collector working for this company called me 43 times in 7 days including at 6am and 10pm. This violates the FDCPA and TCPA. I've documented every call with timestamps for my attorney.

title: Crypto withdrawal held for 60 days without explanation
body: Attempted to withdraw $15,000 in crypto and it's been pending for 60 days. Support says 'under review' but can't explain what's being reviewed. This is my money and they're holding it hostage.

title: Interest rate changed mid-contract without notice
body: My savings account rate was dropped from 4.5% to 0.5% with no advance notification. The terms say 30-day notice required for rate changes. I have the original contract. Contacting CFPB.

title: Fraudulent charge investigation denied without review
body: Reported a $1,800 fraudulent charge with police report and all documentation. Dispute was denied in 24 hours — clearly no investigation was done. FCRA requires a reasonable investigation. Filing complaint.

title: Minimum balance fee charged despite qualifying balance
body: Charged a $15 monthly fee even though my balance never dropped below the $1,500 minimum. When I called they said the calculation uses 'average daily balance' not closing balance. This isn't disclosed anywhere clear.

title: Credit limit reduced without notification
body: My credit limit was cut from $10,000 to $2,000 without any notice. This immediately tanked my credit utilization ratio and dropped my credit score by 40 points. The damage to my credit is real.

title: Wire transfer fee not disclosed until after transaction
body: Was charged a $45 wire transfer fee that was only revealed AFTER the transfer was initiated. The fee wasn't shown on the confirmation screen. This violates Reg E disclosure requirements.

title: Credit report damaged by incorrect reporting
body: This company reported a late payment that was actually made on time — I have the bank statement proving it. Despite filing disputes with all 3 bureaus, the incorrect mark remains. Affecting my mortgage application.

title: Mobile app allowed login without 2FA
body: Despite enabling 2FA in settings, the mobile app allowed login with just a password. This security gap is how my account was compromised. The company claims 2FA was optional despite their marketing saying otherwise.

title: Investment loss due to platform outage during market volatility
body: Platform went down for 3 hours during a major market sell-off. Couldn't execute stop-loss orders. Lost approximately $3,000 that would have been prevented. No compensation offered.

title: Mortgage servicing transfer lost payment records
body: My mortgage was transferred to a new servicer and 2 months of payment records disappeared. Now they say I'm behind on payments. Took 6 weeks and 12 phone calls to resolve. Stressful and incompetent.

title: Payday loan APR exceeds state usury limit
body: Calculated the effective APR on this short-term loan and it's 420%. My state caps payday lending at 36% APR. This company uses a bank charter from another state to circumvent local usury laws.

title: Good app but customer service needs work
body: The app itself is well-designed and transfers are fast. But when I had an issue, it took 5 days to reach a human. For a financial product, that's unacceptable. Otherwise I'd give 5 stars.

title: Finally a bank that respects customers
body: Switched from my big bank and couldn't be happier. No hidden fees, great interest rate, instant transfers. Customer support actually picks up the phone. This is what banking should be.
